stories.title: Deploy Core DSE Analysis Skills
stories.description: As a maintainer, I want to deploy 14 specialized DSE analysis skills so that users can perform comprehensive stock analysis
stories.iWant: to deploy 14 specialized DSE analysis skills
stories.soThat: users can perform comprehensive stock analysis

acceptanceCriteria.description: Given the skills directory, when I list all skills, then 14 skill folders are present with valid SKILL.md files
Given a skill script, when I run it with valid input JSON, then it returns a valid Thinking Card structure
Given all skills, when I validate against fixtures, then each produces correct analysis output

stories.title: Implement Momentum Trading Formulas
stories.description: As a trader, I want momentum indicators calculated accurately so that I can identify trading opportunities

acceptanceCriteria.description: Given price data, when momentum-scanner runs, then RSI, MACD, ROC, and MFI are calculated correctly
Given Minervini criteria, when evaluated, then all 8 SEPA conditions are checked properly
Given volume data, when analyzed, then volume confirmation signals are generated

stories.title: Implement Investment Analysis
stories.description: As an investor, I want value investment criteria evaluated so that I can make long-term investment decisions
stories.soThat: I can make long-term investment decisions

acceptanceCriteria.description: Given fundamental data, when analyzed, then economic moat assessment is provided
Given financial ratios, when calculated, then ROE, PEG, and margin of safety are accurate
Given scoring criteria, when applied, then comprehensive investment grade is generated

stories.title: Publish Skills via gh skill
stories.description: As a coding agent user, I want to install skills via gh skill so that they work in my agent
stories.iWant: to install skills via gh skill

acceptanceCriteria.description: Given the repo, when gh skill publish runs, then all skills validate against spec
Given gh CLI, when I run gh skill install, then skill lands in correct agent directory
Given installed skill, when triggered in agent, then it executes successfully

stories.title: MCP Server with Tools
stories.description: As an MCP client developer, I want skills exposed as MCP tools so that my client can use them

acceptanceCriteria.description: Given MCP server running, when client lists tools, then 14 skill tools plus 2 composites appear
Given tool call with valid input, when executed, then subprocess returns skill output
Given analyze_ticker call, when executed, then pipeline runs leaf skills to completion

stories.title: Data Adapter Implementation
stories.description: As a developer, I want a pluggable data adapter so that skills can get market data

acceptanceCriteria.description: Given file provider, when requesting data, then contract-valid JSON is returned
Given DSE provider, when fetching, then OHLCV and fundamentals are retrieved
Given cache settings, when data requested, then caching and rate limits are respected

stories.title: Dual Transport Support
stories.description: As an operator, I want both stdio and HTTP transports so that desktop and hosted clients work

acceptanceCriteria.description: Given stdio mode, when desktop client connects, then MCP protocol works
Given HTTP mode, when client connects, then streamable MCP over HTTP works
Given transport config, when switching, then server handles both modes correctly

stories.title: Zero-Install Packaging
stories.description: As a user, I want zero-install runners so that setup is quick and easy

acceptanceCriteria.description: Given npx/uvx installed, when running npx stock-buddy-mcp, then server starts immediately
Given Docker, when running container, then server is accessible on configured port
Given config template, when pasted to Claude Desktop, then tools appear

stories.title: CI/CD Pipeline Setup
stories.description: As a maintainer, I want automated CI/CD so that quality is ensured

acceptanceCriteria.description: Given PR, when pushed, then GitHub Actions runs lint, test, and validation
Given version tag, when created, then packages are published automatically
Given release, when created, then immutable with provenance attached

stories.title: Supply Chain Security
stories.description: As a security officer, I want supply chain hardening so that code is trustworthy

acceptanceCriteria.description: Given repo settings, when configured, then secret and code scanning are enabled
Given release, when created, then it's immutable with tag protection
Given build, when completed, then SBOM and provenance are generated

stories.title: Comprehensive Testing
stories.description: As a QA engineer, I want comprehensive tests so that quality is maintained

acceptanceCriteria.description: Given skill code, when tested, then unit test coverage exceeds 80%
Given MCP server, when tested, then integration tests validate all tools
Given performance tests, when run, then response times meet requirements

stories.title: Documentation and Discovery
stories.description: As a new user, I want clear documentation so that I can adopt the skills quickly
stories.soThat: I can adopt the skills quickly

acceptanceCriteria.description: Given README, when read, then installation and usage are clearly explained
Given skill docs, when reviewed, then each has examples and sample data
Given gh skill search, when run, then this repo's skills are discoverable

stories.title: Multi-Agent Analysis
stories.description: As an analyst, I want specialized agents so that I get comprehensive analysis

acceptanceCriteria.description: Given momentum agent, when analyzing, then technical indicators are evaluated
Given investment agent, when analyzing, then fundamentals are assessed
Given business agent, when analyzing, then company viability is evaluated

stories.title: Interactive Criteria Checklists
stories.description: As a beginner, I want visual checklists so that I understand the analysis

acceptanceCriteria.description: Given momentum checklist, when displayed, then 25 criteria show with status
Given investment checklist, when displayed, then 30 criteria show with explanations
Given criteria status, when shown, then visual indicators and recommendations appear

stories.title: Numerical Price Predictions
stories.description: As a trader, I want specific price targets so that I know when to buy and sell
stories.soThat: I know when to buy and sell

acceptanceCriteria.description: Given analysis, when completed, then specific buy price in BDT is provided
Given position, when analyzed, then sell target and stop-loss prices are calculated
Given predictions, when shown, then confidence scores accompany each price

stories.title: DSE Market Adaptation
stories.description: As a Bangladesh investor, I want DSE-specific analysis so that it's relevant to my market

acceptanceCriteria.description: Given criteria, when applied, then DSE P/E benchmarks are used not US ones
Given sectors, when analyzed, then Bangladesh-specific weightings are applied
Given interface, when displayed, then Bengali language option is available

stories.title: Educational Components
stories.description: As a beginner, I want educational explanations so that I can learn while using

acceptanceCriteria.description: Given financial term, when displayed, then beginner-friendly explanation is available
Given indicator, when shown, then visual representation helps understanding
Given analysis, when presented, then decision impact examples are provided

stories.title: Performance Optimization
stories.description: As a user, I want fast response times so that analysis is timely

acceptanceCriteria.description: Given single skill, when executed, then response time is under 2 seconds
Given composite pipeline, when run, then completes within 10 seconds
Given 100 concurrent connections, when handled, then memory stays under 512MB

stories.title: Version Management
stories.description: As a consumer, I want predictable versioning so that I can manage updates

acceptanceCriteria.description: Given releases, when published, then semver is followed consistently
Given changelog, when updated, then all changes are documented
Given deprecation, when announced, then migration path is provided

stories.title: Compliance and Disclaimers
stories.description: As a compliance officer, I want proper disclaimers so that legal requirements are met

acceptanceCriteria.description: Given output, when generated, then educational-only disclaimer is included
Given data source, when used, then only public data is accessed
Given API usage, when accessing, then rate limits are respected
